title: Nature
description: Landscapes, water, and quiet natural scenes in light and shadow.

photos.title: Fallen Tree
photos.alt: A large leafless tree fallen across a calm lake with hills in the distance

photos.title: Hazy Hills
photos.alt: A wide view of misty mountains and a valley under an overcast sky

photos.title: Rocky Shore
photos.alt: Waves breaking over dark rocks along a sandy coastline

photos.title: Rocky Stream
photos.alt: Shallow water flowing over stones in a rocky creek bed

photos.title: Flower Buds
photos.alt: A macro close-up of pale flower buds on thin stems

photos.title: Night Watch
photos.alt: A monkey sitting on a concrete ledge at night with bokeh lights behind
